subcodes.first_line: O ye two patient souls! Your letter was received. The death of that beloved youth and his separation from you have caused the utmost sorrow
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو نفس صابره نامه شما رسید و از وفات آن نوجوان عزیز از جهت فرقت شما نهایت
subcodes.subjects: @theodicy; the mystery of evil; of suffering, @soul; spirit after death, @consolation and comfort, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment
